name: Three-Green Pasta with Scallops and Pesto Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 pound asparagus, trimmed and cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1/2 pound small green beans, trimmed and cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil.
2. Add asparagus and green beans and cook until just crisp-tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Transfer vegetables to a bowl using a strainer.
4. Add fettuccine to the water and boil until just tender but still firm to bite, stirring occasionally.
5. Meanwhile, melt 1 1/2 tablespoons butter in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Add asparagus, green beans, and peas; season with salt and pepper. Stir until heated through and coated with butter, about 1 minute.
7. Return vegetables to the bowl.
8. Melt remaining 1 1/2 tablespoons butter in the same skillet.
9. Add quartered sea scallops; season with salt and pepper and sauté until just cooked through, about 1 minute. Remove from heat.
10. Drain pasta and return it to the skillet.
11. Add vegetables, scallops, pesto, cream, and lemon juice; stir over low heat until pasta is coated with sauce.
12. Season to taste with salt and pepper and serve.
